caption: (Niederle and Vesterlund 2007)
description: Line graph showing the proportion of participants choosing the tournament in Task 4 based on their perceived quartile rank in Task 1, separated by gender (W for women, M for men).

caption: (Niederle and Vesterlund 2007)
description: Line graph showing the proportion of participants choosing the tournament in Task 4 based on their actual rank in Task 1, separated by gender (W for women, M for men).
